positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a thriving forest scene viewed at dawn. The composition should feature interconnected, flowing silhouettes of various types of trees (oak, birch, pine) arranged in a central, symmetrical pattern. The color palette should use deep indigos, emerald greens, and warm coral accents for contrast, set against a clean, creamy background. Use a clean line-art style with geometric overlay textures. The scene must have strong negative space, highly contrasted outlines, and a sense of calm, mystical energy. Suitable for seamless repeat pattern or large apparel placement. Mid-century modern illustration style, highly detailed, vector art quality.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, signature, extra limbs, poorly drawn anatomy, low quality, bad perspective, photorealism, grainy
